name: mapspring-mcp
description: Database schema exploration and Spring code generation for Korean enterprise environments. Connects to PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle, Tibero, and MSSQL directly, or parses local DDL files for air-gapped (network-isolated) deployments. Automatically generates MyBatis ResultMap, DTO classes, and JPA Entity code from real database schema.

url.title: Database URL (Online Mode)
url.description: Connection URL for direct database access (e.g., postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/db, mysql://user:pass@host:3306/db). Leave empty when using offline DDL mode.

ddl_path.title: DDL Directory Path (Offline Mode)
ddl_path.description: Absolute path to a directory containing .sql or .ddl schema files. Use this in air-gapped environments where direct DB access is not available. Leave empty when using online database mode.
